# Architecture -- Everything Claude Code

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED -->

## Project Profile

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Package** | `ecc` (Everything Claude Code) |
| **Language** | Rust (Cargo workspace) |
| **Runtime** | Native binary (no runtime dependency) |
| **Architecture** | Hexagonal (domain → ports → infra → app → CLI) |
| **Crates** | 8 (`ecc-domain`, `ecc-ports`, `ecc-app`, `ecc-infra`, `ecc-cli`, `ecc-test-support`, `ecc-integration-tests`, `ecc-workflow`) |
| **Entry points** | `crates/ecc-cli/` → `ecc` binary, `crates/ecc-workflow/` → `ecc-workflow` binary |
| **Test count** | 1404 (`cargo test`) |
| **Build** | `cargo build --release` → single binary |

## System Diagram

```
User CLI (ecc)  — native Rust binary
  |
  +-- ecc install  -> copy content to ~/.claude/
  +-- ecc init     -> project CLAUDE.md + hooks
  +-- ecc audit    -> configuration health check
  +-- ecc hook     -> run a hook by ID
  +-- ecc validate -> validate content files
  |
  +-- install.sh   (bash fallback orchestrator)
  |
  +-- hooks.json -> hook implementations
  |    +-- bin/ecc-hook (shell shim)
  |    +-- bin/ecc-shell-hook.sh
  |
  +-- Content (copied to ~/.claude/)
       +-- agents/    (51 markdown with YAML frontmatter)
       +-- commands/  (24 active markdown slash commands)
       +-- skills/    (110 domain knowledge directories)
       +-- rules/     (grouped by language: common/, typescript/, python/, ...)
       +-- contexts/  (dynamic system prompt injection)
```

## Build Pipeline

```
crates/
    |
    v  cargo build --release
    |
target/release/ecc  (native binary)
target/release/ecc-workflow  (workflow state machine binary)
    |
    +-- ecc version / install / init / audit / hook / validate / completion
    +-- ecc-workflow init / transition / toolchain-persist / phase-gate / ...

Test pipeline:
    cargo test  (1404 tests across 8 crates)
    cargo clippy -- -D warnings  (zero-warning lint)
```

## Diagram Manifest

The following diagrams would add value to this codebase:

| Diagram Type | Rationale | Priority |
|-------------|-----------|----------|
| **Module Dependency Graph** | 12 lib modules with cross-dependencies; utils is a hub with 8+ dependents | High |
| **Data Flow: Hook Execution** | stdin JSON -> run-with-flags -> hook-flags check -> script exec -> stdout/stderr passthrough | High |
| **Data Flow: Install Orchestrator** | detect -> manifest -> merge (agents/commands/skills/rules/hooks) -> gitignore -> summary | High |
| **Sequence: Session Lifecycle** | session-start -> tool calls -> suggest-compact -> pre-compact -> session-end -> evaluate-session | Medium |
| **Agent Orchestration** | 30 agent markdown files with delegation patterns (planner, tdd-guide, code-reviewer, architect, 6-agent doc system, 6-agent audit system, etc.) | Medium |
| **State Machine: Hook Profiles** | minimal/standard/strict profile system; ECC_HOOK_PROFILE + ECC_DISABLED_HOOKS env vars | Low |
| **Class/Type Hierarchy** | Shared patterns: *Result interfaces (CommandResult, SetAliasResult, etc.), *Options interfaces | Low |

Existing diagrams are preserved in `docs/diagrams/` and `docs/CODEMAPS/`.
